ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., IC, transistor, capacitor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component specification */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was released or updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., thermal, electrical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the condition (e.g., environmental, operational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_parameters" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance range for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_conditions" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasheets" (
  "datasheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datasheet */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the datasheet belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the datasheet */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the datasheet in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the datasheet was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the datasheet */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the datasheet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datasheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, QA) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
column_names: Type of the component (e.g., IC, transistor, capacitor)
Date when the component was released or updated
Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated)
